stages.concept:
# Unit 147: 가정법 과거 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **가정법 과거**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> If I **were** a bird, I **could fly** to you.
> 만약 내가 새라면, 너에게 날아갈 수 있을 텐데.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 가정법 과거는 **현재 사실과 반대**되는 상황을 가정해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 형태: **If + 주어 + 과거동사 ~, 주어 + would/could/might + 동사원형 ~**

> If I **had** a lot of money, I **would travel** around the world.
> 만약 내가 돈이 많다면, 세계 여행을 할 텐데. (실제: 돈이 없다)

> If she **knew** the answer, she **would tell** you.
> 만약 그녀가 답을 안다면, 너에게 말해줄 텐데. (실제: 답을 모른다)

👩‍🏫 선생님: be동사는 주어에 관계없이 **were**를 써요.

> If I **were** you, I **would not** do that.
> 내가 너라면, 그렇게 하지 않을 텐데.

> If he **were** here, he **could help** us.
> 그가 여기 있다면, 우리를 도와줄 수 있을 텐데.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"If I (       ) enough time, I would help you." (내게 충분한 시간이 있다면 널 도울텐데.)
1. have
2. had ✅
3. will have

👩‍🏫 선생님: 현재 사실의 반대를 가정하는 '가정법 과거' 문장이므로, 주절에 would + 동사원형(would help)이 쓰인 것처럼 조건절은 If + 주어 + **과거동사**(had) 형태가 되어야 합니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 가정법 과거는 현재 사실의 반대! If + 과거동사/were, would/could + 동사원형! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 147: 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 제시된 단어를 알맞은 형태로 바꾸어 쓰시오.
If I (have) enough time, I would travel the world.
> **정답** had

---

**02.** If she (be) here, she would help us.
> **정답** were

---

**03.** If I (know) his number, I would call him.
> **정답** knew

---

**04.** If he (be) taller, he could play basketball.
> **정답** were

---

**05.** If I (have) a car, I would drive to school.
> **정답** had

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If I was a bird, I would fly to you.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** was → were

---

**07.** If he has enough money, he would buy a house.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** has → had

---

**08.** If I know the answer, I would tell you.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** know → knew

---

**09.** If she was rich, she would travel the world.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** was → were

---

**10.** If I am you, I would study harder.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** am → were

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
내가 새라면 너에게 날아갈 텐데.
If I a bird, I fly to you.
> **정답** were, would

---

**12.** 돈이 있다면 그 가방을 살 텐데.
If I enough money, I buy the bag.
> **정답** had, would

---

**13.** 그녀가 여기 있다면 도와줄 텐데.
If she here, she help us.
> **정답** were, would

---

**14.** 시간이 있다면 여행을 갈 텐데.
If I time, I travel.
> **정답** had, would

---

**15.** 내가 너라면 더 열심히 공부할 텐데.
If I you, I study harder.
> **정답** were, would

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
내가 부자라면 세계를 여행할 텐데.
If were I rich would I travel the world
> **정답** If / I / were / rich / I / would / travel / the / world

---

**17.** 그의 번호를 알면 전화할 텐데.
If knew I his number would I call him
> **정답** If / I / knew / his / number / I / would / call / him

---

**18.** 차가 있다면 학교에 운전해서 갈 텐데.
If had I a car would I drive to school
> **정답** If / I / had / a / car / I / would / drive / to / school

---

**19.** 그녀가 여기 있다면 기쁠 텐데.
If were she here she would be happy
> **정답** If / she / were / here / she / would / be / happy

---

**20.** 키가 크면 농구를 할 수 있을 텐데.
If were I taller could I play basketball
> **정답** If / I / were / taller / I / could / play / basketball
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 147: 가정법 과거 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I were good at English, I ______________________
you with your homework.
helped
could help
had helped
have helped
> **정답** could help

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I had your email address, I
__________________________________.
have written an email to you
wrote an email to you
will write an email to you
would write an email to you
> **정답** would write an email to you

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I were not busy, I
______________________________.
have taken a trip
can take a trip
could take a trip
took a trip
> **정답** could take a trip

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I ______________________, I could jump and touch
it.
were taller
was taller
am taller
will be taller
> **정답** were taller

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I _________ a jacket, I _________________ warm.
wear - felt
wore - felt
wore - would feel
wear - would feel
> **정답** wore - would feel

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because I'm tired, I can't play football with you.
If I am tired, I can't play football with you.
If I am not tired, I can play football with you.
If I were not tired, I could play football with
you.
If I were tired, I couldn't play football with
you.
> **정답** If I were not tired, I could play football with you.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because I don't like Chinese food, I won't join you for
dinner.
If I like Chinese food, I won't join you for
dinner.
If I don't like Chinese food, I will join you for
dinner.
If I liked Chinese food, I would join you for
dinner.
If I didn't like Chinese food, I would join you
for dinner.
> **정답** If I liked Chinese food, I would join you for dinner.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
As I can't speak perfect English, I can't get a good job
easily.
If I didn't speak perfect English, I couldn't get
a good job easily.
If I can't speak perfect English, I can't get a
good job easily.
If I speak perfect English, I can get a good job
easily.
If I spoke perfect English, I could get a good
job easily.
> **정답** If I spoke perfect English, I could get a good job
easily.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If we had enough food, we could go camping today.
Because we don't have enough food, we can't
go camping today.
Because we didn't have enough food, we
couldn't go camping today.
Because we had enough food, we could go
camping today.
Because we have enough food, we can go
camping today.
> **정답** Because we don't have enough food, we can't go
camping today.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If she had some free time, she would join the book
club.
As she had some free time, she joined the
book club.
As she didn't have any free time, she wouldn't
join the book club.
As she has some free time, she will join the
book club.
As she doesn't have any free time, she doesn't
join the book club.
> **정답** As she doesn't have any free time, she doesn't join
the book club.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I am the director, I could manage my
company well.
What would he do if he knew her email
address?
If I were you, I wouldn't buy this bag.
If I had much money, I would lend you some.
> **정답** If I am the director, I could manage my company
well.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If you were in my shoes, what would you do?
If I were a teacher, I would not give students
much homework.
If he had a chance, he won the game.
I could travel to many other countries if I had
a lot of money.
> **정답** If he had a chance, he won the game.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I were you, I would tell her honestly.
If I didn't go to her birthday party, she would
be disappointed.
If I have a car, I would pick you up.
If I had enough money, I would buy a new
iPhone.
> **정답** If I have a car, I would pick you up.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
If she came early, she can meet Kelly.
I would buy it if it were cheaper.
I may buy you a gift if I had money.
If I could win the game, I made a lot of money.
> **정답** I would buy it if it were cheaper.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
If she talked with him about it, she solved the
problem.
I understood every bit of it if she explained a
situation more slowly.
We found a new place if we had enough
money.
Sally could get another chance if she asked for
it.
> **정답** Sally could get another chance if she asked for it.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
학창 시절로 돌아간다면, 나는 더 열심히 공부할 텐데.
If I will back to my school days, I would study
harder.
If I went back to my school days, I would study
harder.
If I go back to my school days, I will study
harder.
If I go back to my school days, I would study
harder.
> **정답** If I went back to my school days, I would study
harder.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 고르시오.
우리가 시간이 충분하다면 서두를 필요가 없을 텐데.
If we have enough time, we didn't have to
hurry.
If we have enough time, we don't have to
hurry.
If we had enough time, we wouldn't have to
hurry.
If we had enough times, we didn't have to
hurry.
> **정답** If we had enough time, we wouldn't have to hurry.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
If I had a robot, I would make it do my
homework.
If she sings well, she could join our band.
If I had a million dollars, I will buy you a car.
If there were a flying car, we could not be late
for school.
> **정답** If I had a million dollars, I will buy you a car., If she
sings well, she could join our band.

---

**19.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
If I were you, I would help her.
If Bill hear about the news, he would be angry.
I might change the plan if he wanted to join
us.
He may pass the exam if he studied harder.
> **정답** If I were you, I would help her., I might change the
plan if he wanted to join us.

---

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
If Jenny calmed down, I would tell her
everything about it.
If it was snowing, we could go skiing.
What will you do if you were in my shoes?
We would feel cool if we had an air
conditioner.
> **정답** What will you do if you were in my shoes?, If it was
snowing, we could go skiing.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 147 가정법 과거중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
(축약형 사용)
As I am busy, I cannot help you.
→ If I  (     )  busy, I  (     )   (     )  you.
정답 weren't (were not), could, help

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
As I don't have money I can't buy the house.
→ If I  (     )  money, I  (     )   (     )  the house.
정답 had, could, buy

---

**03.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오.
As he doesn't have the key he can't open the door.
→ If he  (     )  a key, he  (     )   (     )  the door.
정답 had, could, open

---

**04.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (축약형 사용)
내가 만약에 바쁘지 않다면, 나는 너와 같이 점심을 먹을 텐
데.
힌트 (     ) be busy, have lunch
If I  (     ) , I  (     )  with you.
정답 weren't busy (were not busy), would have lunch

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 만약에 그의 전화번호를 안다면, 나는 그에게 전화를
할 텐데.
힌트 (     ) know his phone number, will call
If I  (     ) , I
 him.
정답 knew his phone number, would call

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 만약에 형이 있다면, 나는 그와 함께 테니스를 칠 수
있을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) have a brother, can play tennis
If I  (     ) , I  (     )  with him.
정답 had a brother, could play tennis

---

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 바르게 배열하시오.
(필요한 경우 형태를 바꿀 것)
내가 만약에 키가 크다면, 나는 농구팀에 가입할 텐데.
힌트 (     ) I, tall, be, I, join, will
If  (     )   (     )   (     ) ,  (     )   (     )   (     )  the
basketball club.
정답 I, were, tall, I, would, join

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 바르게 배열하시오.
(필요한 경우 형태를 바꿀 것)
우리가 만약에 버스를 놓친다면, 우리는 집까지 걸어갈 텐
데.
힌트 (     ) we, the, bus, miss, we, walk, will
If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) ,  (     )  
 home.
정답 we, missed, the, bus, we, would, walk

---

**09.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
If the bag was not expensive, I could afford to buy
it.
→ If the bag  (     ) , I could afford to
buy it.
정답 were not expensive

---

**10.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
If I spoke English fluently, I will talk to the girl from
London.
→ If I spoke English fluently, I
 from London.
정답 would talk to the girl

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 147: 가정법 과거 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I were good at math, I ______________________ you with your assignment.
helped could help had helped have helped
> 정답: could help

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I had her phone number, I __________________________________.
have called her called her will call her would call her
> 정답: would call her

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I were not tired, I ______________________________.
have joined the hike can join the hike could join the hike joined the hike
> 정답: could join the hike

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I ______________________, I could reach the top shelf.
were taller was taller am taller will be taller
> 정답: were taller

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
If I _________ a sweater, I _________________ warm.
wear - felt wore - felt wore - would feel wear - would feel
> 정답: wore - would feel

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because I'm busy, I can't help you with the project.
If I am busy, I can't help you with the project.
If I am not busy, I can help you with the project.
If I were not busy, I could help you with the project.
If I were busy, I couldn't help you with the project.
> 정답: If I were not busy, I could help you with the project.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Because I don't like seafood, I won't join you for dinner.
If I like seafood, I won't join you for dinner.
If I don't like seafood, I will join you for dinner.
If I liked seafood, I would join you for dinner.
If I didn't like seafood, I would join you for dinner.
> 정답: If I liked seafood, I would join you for dinner.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
As I can't play the piano well, I can't join the band easily.
If I didn't play the piano well, I couldn't join the band easily.
If I can't play the piano well, I can't join the band easily.
If I play the piano well, I can join the band easily.
If I played the piano well, I could join the band easily.
> 정답: If I played the piano well, I could join the band

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If we had enough time, we could go on a trip today.
Because we don't have enough time, we can't go on a trip today.
Because we didn't have enough time, we couldn't go on a trip today.
Because we had enough time, we could go on a trip today.
Because we have enough time, we can go on a trip today.
> 정답: Because we don't have enough time, we can't go

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If he had some free time, he would join the art class.
As he had some free time, he joined the art class.
As he didn't have any free time, he wouldn't join the art class.
As he has some free time, he will join the art class.
As he doesn't have any free time, he doesn't join the art class.
> 정답: As he doesn't have any free time, he doesn't join

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I am the captain, I could lead the team well.
What would she do if she knew his address?
If I were you, I wouldn't buy this jacket.
If I had much time, I would read more books.
> 정답: If I am the captain, I could lead the team well.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If you were in my position, what would you do?
If I were a doctor, I would not charge patients too much.
If she had a chance, she won the prize.
I could travel to many countries if I had a lot of money.
> 정답: If she had a chance, she won the prize.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
If I were you, I would tell him honestly.
